title: The Eyes
description: The Eyes - Vanilla textures, but every mob has one eye!
body:
# Vanilla Minecraft, but every mob has one eye!
Do you ever wonder **what Minecraft would look like if every entity had a single eye?**
~~Yeah... Probably not.~~ **YOU DON'T HAVE TO IMAGINE ANYMORE!**

### These textures are Vanilla inspired, minus the extra eye.
### 
## Every mob has one eye!
![Every mob has one eye!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4873e134ddd387ea6615ff0cea367fd8ac986ebb.png)

## Even the paintings!
![Even the paintings have one eye!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdea72e3f68e482e985a402b2c7982246fff4f08.png)

## Can be used with or without Optifine!
You do not need any mods to use this, but there are custom entity models alternatives that are compatible with Optifine or other CEM mods. 
Recommended Mods: [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
  
![Can be used with or without Optifine!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/646858c8f68c7343c61aecb643d91c5fbbc0bc65.jpeg)

_This project was originally started by [RubikOwl](https://x.com/RubikOwl) and inspired by YouTuber [elybeatmaker](https://youtube.com/elybeatmaker).
The project was later kept up to date by Ely himself with permission from the original creator._
